channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Young tree needs straightening and new support, 4th April
item.description:
Young tree needs straightening and new support located on the right hand side with odd door numbers at the beginning of Dawson Avenue BR5 3AY

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1B, Dawson Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree has died and needs replacing, 4th April
item.description:
Young tree has died and needs replacing located on the left hand side with even door numbers at the beginning of Dawson Avenue BR5 3AZ

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Dawson Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: High amount of fly tipping in alleyway, 4th April
item.description:
High amount of rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 4th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lichfield Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Light Knocked 45°, 4th April
item.description:
One traffic light has been knocked around to face oncoming traffic. 5his is really dangerous as approaching vehicles are crossing on red.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Awful road surface on Cecil Road between Rayleigh Road and Windmill Hill, 4th April
item.description:
The entire portion of Cecil Road between Lidl and the library is really awful. As a cyclist (and it's a cycle route) it's incredibly dangerous due to a bumpy ride, you keep trying to swerve to avoid potholes and risk being thrown off your bike / knocked over by traffic. It's been the same for 2+ years now
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecil Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th April
item.description:
In Thomas lane se6 4RQ is sacks full of rubbish left 2/4/2026 also fly tipping in brookdale road next to 72 and outside life
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Catford Broadway, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers/repair work to pedestrian refuge, 4th April
item.description:
These barriers have the damaged square beacon has been in place for some time. Could you please give me an indication of when the work will be completed and the barriers removed. Thank you. One barrier is loose, on the footway. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous potholes and other deep ridges in the road, 4th April
item.description:
The road surface on Merrivale from Lakenheath to Sheringham Ave has been getting worse and worse over past years and nothing has been done to improve it. As a cyclist it's pretty dangerous, I've almost fallen into a few potholes or been in the way of traffic when swerving
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sheringham Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign has graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on playground sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp posts vandalised, 4th April
item.description:
Two lamp posts have large spray tags on, top corner of Alexandra Rec, closest to alleyway leading to Cator Rd.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign has fallen down, 4th April
item.description:
This sigbpost at the top of Hardings Lane, at the junction with Parish Lane, has fallen down again and is laying on the pavement, causing a trip hazard. Think it was only recently repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked car is blocking the road, cars cannot pass, 4th April
item.description:
This car is parked where is it completely blocking traffic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Furzefield Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty tree pit outside No 3 Alexander Crescent, 4th April
item.description:
This empty tree pit could be a trip hazard as there are two deep holes. Could a new tree please be planted in this tree pit in the next planting season. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pinned, 4th April
item.description:
Graff up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3, 4th April
item.description:
Graff up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.title: 39, 4th April

item.title: Street sign mounting damaged, 4th April
item.description:
Street sign on lamppost has been bent back and the bracket holding it on is damaged. The sign may fall off if not repaired.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Brayards Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree planting request. Outside No 1 Alexander Crescent BR1 4ET, 4th April
item.description:
The tree pit has been covered in tarmac. Could a new tree please be planted in the pit in the upcoming planting season. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 4th April
item.description:
3-4 blocked drain/gully’s causing flood risk. We’ve had previous flooding at the bottom of the street during heavy rain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lawrence Campe Close, Whetstone, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
